zh.Naaldwijk, South Holland, Netherlands: 荷蘭-拉藍德納阿爾德維可
zh.Santpoort Noord, Velsen, North Holland,: 荷蘭努-拉藍德桑普爾吉努德
zh.Brederode, North Holland, Netherlands: 荷蘭努-拉藍德布雷德盧德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode於大約1256年出生在荷蘭努-拉藍德布雷德盧德時，他的父親Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode27歲，母親Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk18歲。他和Ermgard van Naaldwijk至少有1個女兒。他去世於1306年1月28日在荷蘭努-拉藍德桑普爾吉努德享年51歲。

zh-hans.Naaldwijk, South Holland, Netherlands: 荷兰-拉藍德納阿爾德維可

zh-hans.Brederode, North Holland, Netherlands: 荷兰努-拉藍德布雷德盧德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode于大约1256年出生在荷兰努-拉藍德布雷德盧德时，他的父亲Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode27岁，母亲Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk18岁。他和Ermgard van Naaldwijk至少有1个女儿。他去世于1306年1月28日在荷兰努-拉藍德桑普爾吉努德享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Dirk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Flemish and Dutch form of Derek . Its use in the English-speaking world since the 1960s is largely due to the fame of the actor Dirk Bogarde ( 1921–99 , born Derek Niven van den Bogaerde ). He was of Dutch descent, although he was actually born in Scotland. The manly image of the name has been reinforced by its coincidence in form with Scottish dirk ‘dagger’ (from Gaelic durc).

en.lifeSummary: When Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode was born about 1256, in Brederode, North Holland, Netherlands, his father, Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode, was 27 and his mother, Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk, was 18. He had at least 1 daughter with Ermgard van Naaldwijk. He died on 28 January 1306, in Santpoort-Noord, North Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode est né environ 1256, à Brederode, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Ermgard van Naaldwijk. Il est décédé le 28 janvier 1306, à Santpoort-Noord, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode um 1256 in Brederode, Nord-Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode 27 und seine Mutter Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk 18. Er hatte mit Ermgard van Naaldwijk mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. Januar 1306 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Santpoort-Noord, Nord-Holland, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode è nato il circa 1256 nel Brederode, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Ermgard van Naaldwijk. Morì il 28 gennaio 1306, nel Santpoort-Noord, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.Naaldwijk, South Holland, Netherlands: オランダズイド-hオランドナアルドウィジク
ja.Santpoort Noord, Velsen, North Holland,: オランダノオルド-hオランドサントプオオルト-ノオルド
ja.Brederode, North Holland, Netherlands: オランダノオルド-hオランドブレデロド
ja.Santpoort, Velsen, Noord-Holland, Nederl: オランダノオルド-hオランドベルセン
ja.lifeSummary: Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederodeが約1256年にオランダノオルド-hオランドブレデロドで生まれた時，父Floris van Doortoghe van Brederodeは27歳，母Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijkは18歳であった。彼はErmgard van Naaldwijkとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1306年1月28日にオランダノオルド-hオランドサントプオオルト-ノオルドで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode(이)가 대략 1256년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 브레더드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Ermgard van Naaldwijk(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1306년 1월 28일 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 산트포어트-노르드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Santpoort Noord, Velsen, North Holland,: Santpoort-Noord, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.Brederode, North Holland, Netherlands: Brederode, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.Santpoort, Velsen, Noord-Holland, Nederl: Velsen, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode nasceu aproximadamente 1256, em Brederode, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Ermgard van Naaldwijk. Ele faleceu em 28 de janeiro de 1306, em Santpoort-Noord, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode родился около 1256 г. в местности бредирод, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk, 18. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Ermgard van Naaldwijk. Он умер 28 января 1306 г. в местности сантпурт-нурд, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dirk van Doortoghe van Brederode nació aproximadamente 1256, en Brederode, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Floris van Doortoghe van Brederode, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Beatrijs Hugosdr van Naaldwijk, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Ermgard van Naaldwijk. Murió el 28 de enero de 1306, en Santpoort-Noord, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 51 años.
